[Helper] Send a message to a space

Usage: gws +send [OPTIONS] --space <NAME> --text <TEXT>

Options:
      --sanitize <TEMPLATE>  Sanitize API responses through a Model Armor template. Requires cloud-platform scope. Format: projects/PROJECT/locations/LOCATION/templates/TEMPLATE. Also reads GWS_SANITIZE_TEMPLATE env var.
      --space <NAME>         Space name (e.g. spaces/AAAA...)
      --dry-run              Validate the request locally without sending it to the API
      --text <TEXT>          Message text (plain text)
      --format <FORMAT>      Output format: json (default), table, yaml, csv
  -h, --help                 Print help

EXAMPLES:
  gws chat +send --space spaces/AAAAxxxx --text 'Hello team!'

TIPS:
  Use 'gws chat spaces list' to find space names.
  For cards or threaded replies, use the raw API instead.
